title: Sliding contact material
abstract:
PURPOSE: To obtain a sliding contact material with increased hardness, reduced dissipation and lowered and stabilized contact resistance by adding prescribed percentages of C and one or more among W, V, Mo, Ta, Nb and Ni to Ag.
CONSTITUTION: This siliding contact material is made of Ag carbide obtd. by adding 0.1W5wt% C and 0.5W5wt% one or more among W, V, Mo, Ta, Nb and Ni to Ag. Since the contact material has high hardness, the external contact chip of the commutator of a small-sized motor formed with the contact material is not dissipated during sliding, and the contact resistance is low, almost uniform and stable.
